items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 1 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment
watchItems: 跟进：How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment

items.title: How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Robotics foundation models have made remarkable progress. Today's best systems can follow natural language instructions to pick, place, sort, and manipulate a...
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
